user.title: Larnitech HA Bridge
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to a Larnitech-compatible controller through local API2 WebSocket. Enter only the host name or IP address; http:// is not required.

data_description.host: Example: 192.168.xxx.xxx or larnitech.local. Do not include http:// or /api.
data_description.api_key: API2 key from the Larnitech controller settings.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect or authorize with the Larnitech controller. Check host, port and API2 key.

abort.already_configured: This Larnitech controller is already configured.
